experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Engineered multi-channel B2B AI order agent platform using Python backend with Claude Sonnet and RAG architecture, implementing webhook integrations and data structure optimizations that processed 1,000+ orders across 7 enterprise clients

Developed internal tooling in React and Python for operations teams, building AWS S3-backed attachment storage system for 250+ files, Intercom ticketing integration reducing response time by 5+ minutes per request for 50+ customers, and ERP sales order interface

Implemented automated validation pipeline with algorithmic output verification and human-in-the-loop QA layer, iterating on prompt engineering and vector-store correction algorithms to improve precision across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Developed Python infrastructure wrapper around Grafanalib on 3-person engineering team, applying software design patterns and data structures to achieve 83% code reduction (30+ lines to 5 lines)
Executed platform migration of 7+ legacy monitoring dashboards across 3 active Grafana environments, implementing unit testing framework at the dashboard layer to ensure deployment reliability

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Building full-stack professor review platform serving 30,000+ students using TypeScript, React, Node.js backend, and Drizzle ORM with focus on scalable data structures and efficient algorithms
Shipped review submission feature and engineered Python GraphQL webscraper for automated course data ingestion pipeline, delivering features across agile sprint cycles

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

skills.Frameworks & Libraries: React.js, Node.js, FastAPI, Flask, Spring Boot, Tailwind CSS
skills.Developer Tools & Platform: Git, GitHub Actions, Docker, AWS (EC2/S3), GCP, PostgreSQL, Redis, Linux
skills.AI & Data: Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini API, LangChain, RAG, Vector Stores, MCP, Scikit-Learn

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Architected and deployed end-to-end platform at internshipmatcher.com: React + TypeScript frontend, Python FastAPI backend, multi-tier data layer (PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3), and Clerk JWT authentication via JWKS

Designed dual-model Claude pipeline with algorithmic ranking (Haiku 4.5 for skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for deep re-ranking top 30 to top 10) achieving 95%+ accuracy; implemented SSE streaming for real-time progress events to frontend
Optimized parallel processing algorithms for 30+ positions with dynamic batching and prompt caching, reducing latency 52% (270s to 130s) through data structure and concurrency improvements

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Built automated PSG sleep-stage scoring platform with Python backend achieving 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy, validated against clinician-labeled hypnograms from Sleep-EDF dataset
Engineered asynchronous EEG processing pipeline using Redis + ARQ for distributed EDF parsing, spectral feature extraction algorithms, and Scikit-Learn classifiers with per-patient data structures
Implemented sub-10ms WebSocket streaming architecture to React dashboard for real-time EEG waveform and hypnogram rendering, enabling live QA review workflows

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres)
bullets: Engineered and deployed autonomous lead-qualification SMS agent with Python FastAPI backend: FSM-driven pipeline implementing intent classification algorithms, debounce sweeper, and Cal.com auto-booking integration for qualified leads

Integrated multi-service platform architecture with HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking API, SendGrid escalation; dual-model Claude (Haiku + Sonnet) on async Postgres with Alembic migrations and APScheduler

Deployed to production for Bay Area real estate client, automating lead qualification and booking workflows to save ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach through algorithmic filtering and data-driven routing
